hierarchy.rationale: Context, semantic month and selected-day agenda establish an immediate booking order in command and guided recipes.

proportions.rationale: The three command planes and the guided single-task plane allocate space according to decision complexity.
proportions.evidence: desktop initial and mobile schedule frames
proportions.nextAction: Validate the split recipe in the real CTA dialog.

rhythm.rationale: Month rows, period dividers, facts and step rail create consistent operational rhythm without card repetition.

density.rationale: Command exposes comparison context while guided progressively discloses one decision plane at a time.
density.evidence: desktop command and mobile guided frames

depth.rationale: Ink context, quiet paper work plane and selected appointment depth separate layers without excessive elevation.

surfaceEconomy.rationale: One scene contains three meaningful planes at full width and collapses to one task plane on mobile without nested-card wallpaper.

visualImpact.rationale: Calendar Command Center reads as a branded scheduling instrument rather than a generic white booking widget.

typography.rationale: Large editorial context, operational month labels and strong time numerals create a clear display-to-task hierarchy.

color.rationale: Navy establishes trust, teal marks availability and selection, and semantic colors remain tokenized.

iconography.rationale: Minimal arrows, timezone glyph and state marks support navigation without an ornamental icon layer.

responsive.rationale: Container-resolved recipes preserve calendar recognition and move from month to slots without horizontal overflow at 390 px.
responsive.evidence: mobile GVC, layout pass and resolver tests
responsive.nextAction: Capture the medium split host during CTA adapter validation.

motion.rationale: Short causal selection and panel transitions preserve meaning, keyboard behavior and reduced-motion parity.

fidelity.rationale: The rendered command and guided recipes match the selected monthly-calendar direction and adaptive wireframes.
fidelity.evidence: visual direction, wireframes and GVC frames

genericTemplateResistance.rationale: The context rail, semantic availability month and temporal agenda form a distinctive Efeonce command surface.
genericTemplateResistance.evidence: enterprise rubric and desktop first fold
